overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis. The character moves from a covered train platform onto cobblestone streets lined with 19th-century brick buildings, passing pedestrians, horse-drawn carriages, and a tram.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered train platform transitioning to open street

events.description: character exits covered train platform into open cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the covered platform onto the sunlit cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: man in brown coat standing near bench under the platform roof

entered.detail: ornate iron and wood canopy with decorative trim covering the platform
simple wooden slatted bench on the platform
wooden display cart with glass panels on the platform
multi-story brick building with arched windows and red signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered train platform with ornate iron roofing. The character walks forward, exiting the sheltered area around the 3-second mark into a bright, open cobblestone street. The Hotel Chevalier building is visible ahead in the distance, while wooden benches and a display cart occupy the platform area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open historic city street with multi-story brick commercial buildings

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the curve of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the open street passing the Hotel Chevalier building on the left

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback moving along the street
pedestrian in white shirt walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: three-story brick building with white signage reading ARMSTRONG AND PRICE SAILMAKER
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the street edge
ornate black cast iron street lamp post

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open sunlit street, passing the Hotel Chevalier which now dominates the left side of the frame. The cobblestone street is lined with 19th-century brick buildings. A horse rider passes by on the right, and pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The Armstrong and Price building becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with storefront awnings and outdoor displays

events.description: character moves under the building awnings onto the covered sidewalk
passing wooden fruit crates and barrels displayed outside the shops

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered sidewalk past various storefronts and displays

notable_agents.action: man with beard leaning against the building wall with arms crossed

entered.detail: wooden crates filled with apples and other produce displayed on the sidewalk
wooden and canvas storefront awning providing shade over the sidewalk
various hanging signs for businesses including a ship chandler

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a covered sidewalk beneath building awnings, creating a more enclosed and shaded environment. The Armstrong and Price building is now prominent on the left. Wooden fruit crates and barrels line the sidewalk. A man leans against the wall near the entrance, and the streetcar tracks are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk alongside tram tracks with passing streetcar

events.description: green tram streetcar passes by on the tracks to the right of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrow sidewalk as a tram passes by on the adjacent tracks

notable_agents.action: green tram streetcar moving along tracks parallel to the sidewalk
horse-drawn wagon moving down the muddy street

entered.detail: green vintage streetcar with large windows moving along metal tracks
wooden wagon pulled by horses in the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a narrow sidewalk with the character walking alongside active tram tracks. A green streetcar passes by on the right, moving from the distance to close proximity. Horse-drawn wagons are visible in the street ahead. The environment remains shaded by building awnings, with fruit crates and barrels lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a train station into the bustling, sunlit streets of a 19th-century city before returning to the shade of urban awnings. It begins under the ornate iron roofing of a covered platform, moving past wooden benches and a display cart before exiting into the bright light of an open cobblestone street. As the camera advances, the scene opens up to reveal the Hotel Chevalier and a row of brick buildings, passing a horse rider and pedestrians under a clear sky. The environment then shifts back into a more enclosed space as the character moves beneath building awnings, passing the Armstrong and Price building and wooden fruit crates. Finally, the path narrows alongside active streetcar tracks, where a green tram passes in close proximity while horse-drawn wagons move through the distance.
